title: ProjectF
description: This is ProjectF, it was created to add new mobs, tools, weapons and armor to minecraft. And also a new dimension, primitive tools.
body:
This is ProjectF, it was created to add new mobs, tools, weapons and armor to minecraft. And also a new dimension, primitive tools. To make it interesting for you, download this modification, it will come in handy for you!

Disclaimer: I created this modification in 2020, I am no longer going to support it, I just transferred it from curseforge (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/projectf)

This mod created by mcreator: https://mcreator.net
